title: BleaterBoundNeoForge 2
description: A modpack for my Twitch community that lets everyone play on the server and host events within. The scope of the project is to one, allow Crowd Control integration, and two, be stable and optimized.
body:
### Modpack for The Bleat Squad online community, a Twitch & Art based community centered around and run/managed by Trustmeiexist. **The Idea/Scope/Hopes & Dreams:** - Provide an optimized, stable, and reliable modpack that integrates with Crowd Control. **Is it optimized?** - Runs well so far! **Is it stable?** - So far! Lets go! Only minor bumps! **Is it reliable?** - Not really! But I'm doing my best to make it so! **Does it let people dig me into a hole when I stream?** - Yes it does! All in all, its a kitchen sink modpack reminiscent of the old Tekkit packs that let you go to space with friends and make cool space bases with force fields. (Just a bit more magic cause I love magic) Ultimately, it should function on anything with 4-6 jigglebytes (gigabytes) of RAM, and with otherwise passable hardware. **Heads up! I'm not affiliated with Crowd Control, or any of the mods, modders, hosts, etc. who's work they've so kindly allowed to be in this pack, or run this pack.** Heres a list of the mods, versions, urls, authors, and etc! Please check them out, and please report issues in this pack to me (Trustmeiexist) first, so that I can ensure its not a skill issue on my part.
